currentObjective: Build C1 AI Tutor Chat (Claude) and S7 Diagnostic Placement Test (Codex) — parallel feature tracks.
mergePolicy: No merge to master without explicit user approval.

workstreams.goal: AI Tutor Chat — after a wrong answer, kid taps 💬 Why? to get a Bedrock-generated explanation. UI in app/learn/page.tsx + new app/api/tutor/route.ts endpoint.
chunks: 1. app/api/tutor/route.ts — Bedrock call, auth guard, rate limit
2. app/learn/page.tsx — Why? button + chat drawer UI

workstreams.goal: Diagnostic Placement Test — 5-question adaptive quiz on first session to calibrate currentDifficultyMaths. New app/api/diagnostic/route.ts + DynamoDB write. Must not touch app/learn/page.tsx.
chunks: 1. app/api/diagnostic/route.ts — question selection + score → difficulty mapping
2. app/api/diagnostic/submit/route.ts — persist result to child record

coordinationRules: Read plan, ownership, both status files, and both handoff files before starting a new task.
Update status every 60 seconds while actively working.
Chunk work: ≤4 atomic commits, each tested independently before moving on.
Report etaMinutes honestly — never set to 0 until truly done.
Set blocker immediately if a test fails or a blocker is hit — do not continue around the problem.
Declare chunk scope in handoff file on task start so user has full visibility.
No merge to master without explicit user approval.
